title: Maple Walnut Fondue
instructions: In a double boiler, heat white chocolate and cream on low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture is smooth and creamy.
Add maple syrup, maple extract, and spices.
Transfer to fondue pot and keep warm over low heat.
Serve with gingersnap cookies, cubed gingerbread, apples, pears, or other dippers.
notes: White chocolate can easily burn, so stir constantly and use low heat.
Suggested dippers: gingersnap cookies, cubed gingerbread, apples, pears
